% Refutation found. Thanks to Tanya!
% SZS status Theorem for beethoven_composer_positive
% SZS output start Proof for beethoven_composer_positive
1. is_music_piece(symphony_no_9) [input(axiom)]
2. ! [X0,X1] : ((is_music_piece(X1) & writes(X0,X1)) => composer(X0)) [input(axiom)]
3. writes(beethoven,symphony_no_9) [input(axiom)]
9. composer(beethoven) [input(conjecture)]
10. ~composer(beethoven) [negated conjecture 9]
11. ~composer(beethoven) [flattening 10]
16. ! [X0,X1] : (composer(X0) | (~is_music_piece(X1) | ~writes(X0,X1))) [ennf transformation 2]
17. ! [X0,X1] : (composer(X0) | ~is_music_piece(X1) | ~writes(X0,X1)) [flattening 16]
18. is_music_piece(symphony_no_9) [cnf transformation 1]
19. ~writes(X0,X1) | ~is_music_piece(X1) | composer(X0) [cnf transformation 17]
20. writes(beethoven,symphony_no_9) [cnf transformation 3]
24. ~composer(beethoven) [cnf transformation 11]
25. ~is_music_piece(symphony_no_9) | composer(beethoven) [resolution 19,20]
26. composer(beethoven) [forward subsumption resolution 25,18]
27. $false [forward subsumption resolution 26,24]
% SZS output end Proof for beethoven_composer_positive
% Termination reason: Refutation
